reference: I have been having severe pain up and down my belly button and to the right of my right side. We have ruled out appendicitis, cysts, gallbladder stones, pregnancy, and endometriosis. This pain is preventing me from working; I cannot lift anything heavy. I have been ordered by doctors not to work. What could it be?
